strategy: Always keep a Prism on Kallah before you attack — hitting him without a prism makes him self-heal with Minor Blessing.
With a prism up, every single-target hit also makes him blast himself for 500 and strip a prism, and that self-damage lands even if your attack did not consume the prism.
So keep prisms stocked and let him chip his own health down alongside your hits.
Stack blades and traps, then hit single-target (pet spells don't count for either cheat); he has no school resist, so any school works.
With only 5,910 health, a couple of prism-backed hits plus his own self-blasts finish him fast.
cheatNotes: Attack him single-target without a prism on him and he heals himself with Minor Blessing — always prism him first.
With a prism on him, each single-target hit makes him Ice Blast himself for 500 and remove a prism — free extra damage, so keep prisms stocked.
The 500 self-hit happens even when your attack didn't use up the prism, so you get the bonus regardless — reapply and keep swinging.
